extension.summary: Download Plex media for offline viewing/listening
extension.description: Adds a context menu option to download movies, TV shows, and music from PlexKodiConnect to your Kodi device for offline use. Supports downloading individual items, entire albums/seasons, or full artists/shows.

Stream audiobooks and podcasts from your Audiobookshelf server. Features include:
* Stream audiobooks (M4B, MP3, multi-file) * Stream podcasts with episode management * Progress sync with server * Download for offline playback * Chapter navigation * Resume playback * Search and add new podcasts * Find new episodes (from RSS) * API Key or Username/Password authentication
extension.news:
v1.0.12 (2026-07-07) - Kodi repo compliance - Settings are now localized via strings.po (en_GB). - Icon flattened to remove transparency; LICENSE renamed to LICENSE.txt.
v1.0.11 (2026-07-06) - Chronological offline queues - Downloads now store the episode publish date, so offline auto-play queues order episodes chronologically (matching the online queue) instead of by download time.
v1.0.10 (2026-07-06) - Auto-play: mixed streamed/downloaded - NEW: Auto-play queues now mix streamed and downloaded episodes - downloaded ones play from disk, the rest stream, in one queue. - NEW: Auto-play also works fully offline, using downloaded episodes. - FIXED: No resume dialog interrupts between downloaded episodes in a queue (silent resume, matching streamed episodes).
v1.0.9 (2026-07-06) - Auto-play next podcast episode - NEW: "Auto-play next episode" setting (Podcast Sync, default off). Plays a native Kodi playlist from the selected episode forward (oldest to newest) so episodes advance automatically. - Progress is tracked per episode; the monitor stops cleanly at each track boundary so positions are never cross-saved.
v1.0.8 (2026-07-06) - Progress sync fix - FIXED: Progress upload no longer loops forever. Audiobookshelf returns an empty body on a successful progress save; the client was mis-parsing that as an error and retrying endlessly. - FIXED: Empty/non-JSON 2xx responses now treated as success.
v1.0.7 (2026-05-28) - Now-playing cover art & author - FIXED: Audiobook/podcast covers now show on the Kodi now-playing screen - NEW: Author shown on now-playing screen for audiobooks - NEW: Podcast creator (or show name) shown on now-playing screen for episodes - IMPROVED: Streaming uses cached cover when available, falls back to server URL - IMPROVED: Offline playback uses the downloaded cover file
v1.0.6 (2026-05-27) - New JWT Authentication - CHANGED: Use new Audiobookshelf JWT auth flow (requires server v2.26.0+) - NEW: Short-lived access tokens (1h) with automatic refresh - NEW: Refresh token stored locally; no more re-login on every cache miss - REMOVED: Legacy single-token login fallback
v1.0.5 (2025-12-09) - Comprehensive Sync Overhaul - NEW: Bidirectional sync - pulls progress from server if ahead - NEW: Automatic sync when opening app (startup sync) - NEW: Automatic sync when reconnecting to WiFi after offline mode - NEW: Background sync periodically polls server for updates - NEW: Unified progress storage for both downloaded and streamed content - FIXED: Audiobook progress sync now works correctly - FIXED: Chapter/multi-file audiobooks now save correct overall position - FIXED: Clicking Chapter 2+ no longer resets progress to 0 - FIXED: file_offset properly tracked for multi-file audiobooks - FIXED: Podcast progress sync improved - FIXED: Duration detection issues resolved - FIXED: Resume position now properly syncs both ways - IMPROVED: If local progress ahead, uploads to server - IMPROVED: If server progress ahead, downloads to local - IMPROVED: Migrates old progress data automatically
v1.0.4 - Direct Episode Adding - NEW: Add episodes directly from RSS without server refresh endpoint - NEW: Click [NEW] episode to add it directly to server - NEW: [Add All X Episodes] adds all new episodes at once - NEW: Episodes cached locally for faster batch operations - REMOVED: Refresh Podcast from RSS (server endpoint not available) - FIXED: No more "Server RSS refresh not available" errors - FIXED: Progress sync now works for both audiobooks and podcasts - IMPROVED: Full RSS metadata captured (description, pubDate, etc.)
v1.0.3 - Progress sync overhaul v1.0.2 - Kodi 21 DialogProgress fix v1.0.1 - Token caching, finished threshold fix v1.0.0 - Initial release

extension.summary: Run Home Assistant webhooks from Kodi
extension.description: Create webhooks and trigger them via Keymap Editor or Kodi events. Each webhook gets a unique ID that can be mapped to any button using Keymap Editor, or fired automatically on playback/system events (playback start/stop/pause, screensaver, Kodi start/stop).

extension.summary: Android device and Samsung DeX streaming with auto-detect
extension.description: Stream your Android device screen or the Samsung DeX desktop on Kodi using scrcpy. DeX display id is auto-detected; Virtual Desktop mode (--new-display) works without an active DeX session. Works with LibreELEC and desktop Linux.
extension.disclaimer: Requires USB debugging enabled on your Android device.
extension.news: v2026.6.12 - Samsung DeX + simpler menu - NEW: Samsung DeX mirroring with auto-detected display id - NEW: Virtual Desktop mode (--new-display) - desktop windowing without an active DeX session (One UI 7 / Android 15+) - NEW: Detect Displays menu action - CHANGED: menu collapsed to Stream Device / Samsung DeX / Virtual Desktop / Detect Displays / Settings - each asks USB vs WiFi only if an IP is configured, otherwise defaults to USB - FIXED: dropped removed --forward-all-clicks flag; uses --mouse-bind for scrcpy 2.0+ (forwards right/middle clicks) - UPDATED: bundled scrcpy 3.3.4 to 4.0 on x86_64 (SDL3, self-contained); aarch64 stays on 3.3.4 (no official arm64 build) - Inspired by TuxDex, without miraclecast/root/network changes
